codeReview.summary: Pure file rename of yj_metadata_getters.go → yj_metadata.go and yj_metadata_getters_test.go → yj_metadata_test.go. Git confirms 100% similarity (0 insertions, 0 deletions). Both new files exist, both old files are gone. Package declaration is correct (package kfx). Tests pass. One minor stale comment remains referencing the old filename.

issues.description: Stale comment still references old filename: '// Go file: internal/kfx/yj_metadata_getters.go'. Should be updated to '// Go file: internal/kfx/yj_metadata.go' to match the rename. This is purely cosmetic and does not affect functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Several documentation files outside the worker's scope still reference the old filename 'yj_metadata_getters.go': docs/audit_yj_metadata.md, PARITY_AUDIT.md, .factory/library/resources-audit.md, .factory/library/audit-yj-structure-findings.md. These should be updated to reflect the rename for consistency, though they are outside this feature's scope.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grep for 'yj_metadata_getters' found references in docs/audit_yj_metadata.md:4, docs/audit_yj_metadata.md:69, PARITY_AUDIT.md:70, .factory/library/resources-audit.md:23, .factory/library/audit-yj-structure-findings.md:21

summary: Clean, correct pure file rename. The git diff shows 100% content preservation with git mv detection. Both files were renamed correctly, old files are removed, package declaration is correct, and all tests pass. One minor non-blocking issue: the internal comment on line 15 of yj_metadata.go still references the old filename 'yj_metadata_getters.go'. Documentation files in docs/ and .factory/library/ also reference the old name but are outside this feature's scope.
